case_title: SHERWIN TAN VS. PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAN, SHERWIN AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF SHERWIN TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KELLY PRUETT, CLAIMS REP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-02-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SHERWIN TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KELLY PRUETT, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. PARTIES AGREED TO NEGOTIATE A SETTLEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, SHERWIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, SHERWIN AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
